content.full_text:
TELEPHONE ADVICE

FILE SUMMARY If a committee reported receipt of a "pledge" on its campaign statement as required, when does the major donor (since the pledge was over $5,000) report it & how/what does he report when the pledge is actually paid to the committee? ADVICE: Form 461 reflects "pledge" made as of date pledge is made since "contribution"

CODE/REGULATION SECTION(S) 82015 & 84211 (see below)

REQUESTING PARTY Dick Bryant FILE NO. TA-82-075
POSITION/CITY/AGENCY Campaign Report Unit,
L.A. County Registrar-Recorder's Office
STAFF PERSON Helen Arriola DATE OF CALL 4/5/82

includes "enforceable promise" (pledge); Summary of form 461 will not show pledge amount since no actual payment has been made. On any subsequent campaign statement required by the major donor for other activity (at the time pledge is paid to the committee) the form 461 will reflect the payment in the summary section w/notation.
